_meta.description: Curated list of tech companies using Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, Eightfold, and SmartRecruiters ATS platforms
_meta.verified: All slugs verified live with entry-level job counts as of date noted in notes
_meta.notes: Session 57: Added 12 Greenhouse boards. Session 60: Added SpaceX/Anduril/Lucid/Palantir. Session 97: Added Workday section (21 tenants verified 2026-02-28). RTX confirmed on Workday (globalhr.wd5/rec_rtx_ext_gateway, 3745 jobs) — WD-1 research was wrong about Phenom. WD-4 (2026-02-28 S98): 9 hospital tenants added (CCF, VUMC, Intermountain, MGB, Geisinger, Ochsner, SaintLukes, Montefiore, Sharp). CCF+Montefiore have us_only=true (campus/address-only locations). Kaiser/HCA/Mayo not yet verified (JS-rendered career pages). S107: 4 quant/trading GH tenants added (Jane Street 229, IMC 149, Akuna Capital 33, Jump Trading 67). Finance domain tag added to tag-engine.js. S112 ATS-EXP: +62 GH, +42 Lever, +51 Ashby, +20 Workday (176 companies total, all verified 2026-03-01). S147: +7 GH (Klaviyo, Asana, Squarespace, DoorDash, Pinterest, CockroachLabs, Starburst) — verified entry-level eng roles exist. 10 others from research batch rejected. S147: +2 Workday (Snap/myworkdaysite.com, Morgan Stanley). +3 Eightfold section (AmEx 493, John Deere 184, Zebra 266) — new ATS platform. S148: +10 Workday (Fidelity, Analog Devices, Stryker, State Street, KLA, Moog, Entegris, Rolls-Royce, LPL Financial — all verified live 2026-03-11). Discovered via SimplifyJobs WD tenant analysis. Goldman Sachs/SBD/Comcast/Expedia/Amgen excluded (non-standard domain, wrong site, or non-tech noise). S154: SmartRecruiters section added (17 companies, 256 total interns verified 2026-03-11). Slugs discovered from speedyapply/pittcsc/cvrve competitor repos + API testing. Low-intern slugs (RaytheonTechnologies/EVERSANA1/WellmarkInc) kept for new-grad volume. S167: SUPPLY-NEW-COMPANIES — removed 9 WD duplicates (ASML/Broadcom/Northrop/Cisco/Disney/HP/Marvell/Proofpoint/Stryker). GH +19 (CoreWeave/Rubrik/OscarHealth/Canonical/Appian/Anaplan/SoFi/Nuro/Formlabs/Qualtrics/IXLLearning/AlphaSights/Figure/SamsungResearchAmerica/LatitudeAI/AlphaFMC/Oklo/UnderdogFantasy/Loop). WD +40 (). GH: 126→145. WD: 79→110. S192 Phase3b: +12 GH (CLEAR/Arcesium/SharkNinja/CZBiohub/Personalis/TeleTracking/ReachFinancial/Blueprint/Tudor/StevensCap/Freeform/ExtraHop) +6 Lever (AHEAD/MBRDNA/Wolverine/LifeChurch/BHGFinancial/Symmetry) +5 Ashby (Vultr/1Password/Replicant/Genies/Radiant). GH: 169 Lever: 58 Ashby: 80.
